scripts.build: tsc && pnpm exec esbuild src/renderer/renderer.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/renderer/renderer.js --platform=browser && node scripts/bundle-html.js src/renderer/index.html dist/renderer/index.html && node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync('src/renderer/overlay.html','dist/renderer/overlay.html')" && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(fs.existsSync('src/renderer/assets')) fs.cpSync('src/renderer/assets','dist/renderer/assets',{recursive:true})"
